title: Design a Cafe Menu
description: A styled cafe menu page for Camper Cafe, built with basic CSS. The HTML uses semantic sections for coffee and dessert items with article elements per item. The CSS covers background images, custom fonts, centered layouts, a max-width container, inline-block pricing rows, styled horizontal rules, a footer with link states, and a negative top margin trick to tighten spacing between headings and icons.
objectives: Use a background-image on the body
Center a max-width container with margin: auto
Use display: block with margin: auto to center images
Style inline-block elements for side-by-side price layout
Apply font-family, font-size, and text-align to multiple selectors
Use negative margin to fine-tune vertical spacing
Style anchor link states: link, visited, hover, and active
